content:
# Hunter Green Account Referral Terms

## Referral Fit
Use the Hunter Green Account referral entry when the referred customer is opening a Hunter Green Account in the business_checking category. Do not apply these terms to personal checking, other business checking accounts, or fee-free account referrals. See "Business Checking Referral Programs" when comparing this offer with other business checking referral entries.

## Eligibility Requirements
1. The referring customer must have held the qualifying relationship for at least 60 days before the referral is counted.
2. The referred customer must make a qualifying deposit of at least 15000 into the Hunter Green Account.
3. The referral remains subject to the annual referral limit of 10 completed Hunter Green Account referrals for the referrer.

## Bonus Amounts
| Party | Bonus |
| --- | --- |
| Referrer | 175 |
| Referred customer | 100 |

If the referred deposit is below 15000, neither bonus should be represented as earned under this account entry. If the referrer has already reached 10 qualifying Hunter Green Account referrals for the year, do not quote an additional referrer bonus for this program. See "Referral Limits And Eligibility" for how annual limits and eligibility checks are applied across referral conversations.
title: Hunter Green Account Referral Terms
